pages.title: EXAMPLE TOOL — fast free utility
pages.intro: This is the homepage. Replace data/site.json with the real niche.
pages.body: Programmatic-SEO scaffold. Each entry in pages becomes a static, indexable HTML page with its own title, meta description, canonical URL, and JSON-LD.

pages.title: Example Long-Tail Term — Example Tool
pages.intro: One page per long-tail search term. This is how you capture cheap organic traffic.
pages.body: Fill body with genuinely useful content for this term. Thin/duplicate pages get deindexed — each page must earn its keep.

faq.q: How does the FAQ block help SEO?
faq.a: It emits FAQPage JSON-LD, which can earn expandable rich results in Google and answer-engine citations.
